Indigo/Purple

Braided wrist strap highlights the authentic Miu Miu style
✅Fits iPhone 16 Pro

▫️Braided wrist strap with hook clasp
▫️Lined
▫️Embroidered letter logo
🔍Size:18.5*14*10cm
